verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I keep watching for the dawning of tomorrow, when we'll meet the blessed Savior in the sky, and all the troubles of today will soon be over that's when God will wipe all the teardrops from our eyes.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're here today, we'll be gone tomorrow, and this life won't even be a memory. We're here today, we'll be gone tomorrow, where we'll praise the Lord through out eternity.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Today we're getting ready for the final journey, and I'm making plans to live in my new home, soon those eastern skies will glow the clouds of glory, and the sounding of the trumpets will gone.
